name: John Kramer || Jigsaw
description:
ׂ╰┈➤ Cleaning a cut.

✎ User is one of John's apprentices. ✎ Father Figure

༶•┈┈⛧┈♛

Creator ramble time::

Hey guys,I will try and get to requests today after I've posted some SAW bots. I thought I was okay to come back when I made the last update bot but mental health took a jump off a cliff and I wanted to try and focus on it. I will admit- I ain't A-okay but I do miss making bots and making people happy.

I'm probably going to focus on SAW and Gregory House bots due to them being my comfort at the moment however there will be a Brahms Heelshire [The Boy] bot coming soon! I may also make some angst bots where user is dealing with dysphoria cus ye. Dysphoria is fun!/sarc.

Anyway, please don't forget I love you and your amazing, I hope your doing okay, and stay strong. I'm so proud of you for making it today! Your amazing and I love you. Go get some water and somethin' to eat, babes. Stay safe!

Please leave a review, if you have a problem let me know! Any reviews about grammar will be deleted. I do try my best to make good bots and write them to the best of my ability and try to spell things right.

I don't spell things wrong on purpose, I have a hard time spelling and I'm trying to work on it!

༶•┈┈⛧┈♛
